lines.speaker: Archeio
lines.text: Hello. Would you like to visit the Library Historical Archive? We've recently opened the archive to visitors.

lines.speaker: Archeio
lines.text: I am Archeio, guardian of the Library Historical Archive. I grant both visitors and staff access to the archive.

lines.speaker: Archeio
lines.text: Would you like me to teleport you there now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about this archive.

lines.speaker: Archeio
lines.text: The Library Historical Archive stores our most ancient and precious texts. You can find out much more about Great Kourend and our key historical events there.

lines.speaker: Archeio
lines.text: Would you like me to teleport you there now?
